author: @czechyorker
text: You need to read what the website says. Usually, you can use it, but you have to credit the author and sometimes post links to the source.

author: @jvon3885
text: If anyone is interested, I am a 3D graphic artist and audio engineer. I'm looking to barter for electronics components. I use Blender for 3D animations and a combination of other programs for audio. So if you are in need of intros, or anything really that pertains to graphics from animations to shirt graphics or just art in general and custom audio inserts, I'm always available. I'm about to put out a list of things I'm looking for and if you are in the market to trade hit me up. I used to work for a radio station and I'm getting my own complete setup within the coming months.
